description: Claude Code tool permission preferences for the Pathways OI Trust project.

notes.rm: Safe to run on build artifacts (dist/, node_modules/, *.tmp). Ask before deleting source files, migration files, or docs.
notes.database_migrations: Removed from ask list — migrations are SQL files I write; Phil applies them manually via the Supabase dashboard. The workflow already enforces the gate.
notes.docker: Removed from ask list — not used in this project. Will flag naturally if it ever comes up.
notes.sudo: Should never be needed in this project. If I think I need it, something is wrong — flag it rather than ask.
